variables.label: Wafer starts by node
variables.description: How merchant-GPU demand and supply momentum bear on wafer-start planning across leading-edge nodes.

variables.label: Advanced-packaging (CoWoS / SoIC) allocation
variables.description: Whether advanced-packaging capacity is the binding constraint on realizable GPU revenue, and how tight allocation is.

variables.label: Leading-node customer mix
variables.description: How the balance among merchant-GPU vendors and hyperscaler custom silicon shapes the leading-node customer base.

variables.label: Pricing leverage
variables.description: How firm end-market GPU pricing and demand-supply balance affect pricing leverage across the value chain.

variables.label: Foundry competitive events
variables.description: Competitive, policy, or second-source developments that could shift foundry demand or the exposure around it.
